title: taraxacum lacustre
intro: Taraxacum lacustre, also known as Lake dandelion, is a species of dandelion that grows near water sources, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and jagged leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, making it useful for treating urinary issues and relieving digestive discomfort. The health benefits of Taraxacum lacustre include its ability to reduce blood pressure, improve liver function, and act as an antioxidant, protecting against cell damage and promoting overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum lacustre can be found in tea, tincture, and capsule forms, often used to support kidney health and alleviate symptoms of kidney stones.
